commands: echo NGINX_ACTIVE=$(sudo systemctl is-active nginx || true)
echo STAFF_ACTIVE=$(sudo systemctl is-active staff-api || true)
echo CLIENT_ACTIVE=$(sudo systemctl is-active client-api || true)

curl -i --max-time 10 -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1/api/v1/auth/login -H 'Host: api.vadpivi.com' -H 'Origin: https://app.vadpivi.com' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type,accept,authorization' || true
